---
title: "Homework2026-03"
author: "曹力文 SA24008217"

---

# Homework2026-03 作业
# 数据处理与可视化

## 一、数据处理（doubs 数据集 env）
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}


library(ade4)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

data(doubs)
env <- doubs$env

result <- env |>
  select(dfs, alt, oxy, pH) |>
  rename(distance = dfs, oxygen = oxy) |>
  filter(alt > 200) |>
  arrange(desc(alt)) |>
  mutate(oxygen_category = ifelse(oxygen > 90, "High", "Low")) |>
  group_by(oxygen_category) |>
  summarise(
    mean_alt = mean(alt, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pH = mean(pH, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

result
```

## 二、数据可视化
```{r}


# 图1：alt vs oxy
ggplot(data = doubs$env) +
  geom_point(mapping = aes(x = alt, y = oxy))

# 图2：按 dfs 着色
ggplot(data = doubs$env) +
  geom_point(mapping = aes(x = alt, y = oxy, color = dfs))
```
```
